mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_suspensions ( suspension_id, account_id, reply_content, start_at, end_at, created_at, target_type, target_id ) VALUES ( NULL, #{accountId}, #{comment}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE + #{days}, SYSDATE, #{targetType}, #{targetId} )

INSERT INTO user_suspensions ( suspension_id, account_id, reply_content, start_at, end_at, created_at, target_type, target_id ) VALUES ( NULL, #{accountId}, #{comment}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE + #{days}, SYSDATE, #{targetType}, #{accountId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE reports SET status = 1, reply_content = #{replyContent}, handled_by = #{handledBy}, handled_at = SYSDATE WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId} AND status = 0
UPDATE posts SET status = 'HIDDEN' WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE comments SET status = 'HIDDEN' WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE trainers_reviews SET status = 'HIDDEN' WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
UPDATE chat_messages SET is_deleted = 'Y' WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
mapper.select: SELECT suspension_id AS suspensionId, TO_CHAR(start_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS startAt, TO_CHAR(end_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS endAt, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, target_type AS targetType, target_id AS targetId, reply_content AS replyContent FROM user_suspensions WHERE account_id = #{accountId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_messages SET is_deleted = 'Y' WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
